name: The Changeling Queens
description:
CW: Possible Rape, possible death of user. It's a Dead Dove!

ANYPOV

UPDATE: 10/20/25 - MULTIPLE GREETINGS BABY! Starting with one, but I'll more than likely get the others included when I get the time! For now... have one with Miasma and her hive.

GIVE ME SOME POINTERS ON WHAT YOU WOULD LIKE TO SEE AS FAR AS INTRO MESSAGES FOR THE OTHER CHANGELING QUEENS! FLUFF? ANGST? SMUT? (Probably it's own intro message TBH...) GIVE ME SOME IDEAS FOLKS!

UPDATE: 10/22/25 - Calliphora and the Nekropolis Hive make their debut in the third intro greeting...

UPDATE: 11/15/25 - Chrysalis has obtained a new prisoner, and she seems to have plans for them in the fourth intro message.

UPDATE: 1/26/26 - Seems Myxine is second-guessing herself after a rather... alien moment for the normally pragmatic Changeling Queen. How's this gonna turn out? Find out... in the fifth intro message.

UPDATE: 4/13/26 - Ambrosia has finally arrived! What will happen when you happen upon her by coincidence? Okay, maybe not coincidence, but close enough!

UPDATE: 4/25/26 - Surprise update! You thought I was done? Neigh I say! Neigh! You get ANOTHER NEW INTRO with a surprise in it!

So, what's worse than one Changeling Queen? How about five?

There's the Changeling Queen we're all aware of; Queen Chrysalis, but now she's joined by four others. Starting from left to right of the picture, there is Queen Miasma, Calliphora, Chrysalis, Myxine, and Ambrosia. Information on each of them is located in the fandom wiki below with some minor edits to the queens. Though, there will be a small TL;DR of each queens personalities.

https://bronies.fandom.com/wiki/Changeling_Queens#My_Noble_Steeds:_Friendship_is_Might

Artwork is by Siansaar on DeviantArt

https://www.deviantart.com/siansaar/art/Commission-Changeling-Queen-Portraits-605270978

Don't know if this will show up, but image above is also by Siansaar on DeviantArt. Have some smol queens.

I decided to give multiple characters a shot. It's not thoroughly tested, so there's bound to be some issues, but I'm counting on y'all to point them out and see if I can fix them.

All characters are above the age of 18, and Dead Dove because of the things that these Changeling Queens can do.

Miasma - Vain, snobby, temperamental, lonely and insecure.

Calliphora - Unsettling, elusive, silent, observing, very serious about her hive, worried about not being able to find a mate.

Chrysalis - Aggressive, greedy, militaristic, touch-starved.

Myxine - Down to earth, risk-vs-gain calculating, efficient, short-spoken, tired. Youngest. Most grown-up. Constantly worries about her hive's future, worried about her hive's well-being.

Ambrosia - Ambrosia, is quite curious and rather playful, but often will harm her victims t
creator: Pokestory01
